saas_app.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
saas_app.rationale: SaaS platform needs to feel authoritative, tech-savvy, and high-converting (Webflow/Framer inspiration). Uses stark contrasts and minimal decoration to let the builder UI shine.

artisan_template.name: Organic & Earthy
artisan_template.rationale: The generated artisan websites must feel trustworthy, grounded, and premium. Earthy tones and classic typography build trust with local clients.

headings.usage: Bold, expressive, tech-forward. Do not center unless absolutely necessary.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable technical body text.

mono.usage: Used for overlines, labels, code snippets, and UI coordinates.

headings.usage: High-end craftsmanship, editorial trust, and elegance.

body.usage: Friendly, modern, easy to read for all demographics.

saas_app.surfaceStrategy: Neobrutalist lite: 1px crisp borders (border-black/10), flat or sharp shadows, no muddy gradients.

artisan_template.surfaceStrategy: Tactile and warm: no glassmorphism, soft earthy shadows, slight roundness (rounded-md).

marketing_page.grid_mode: Tetris (Bento Grid) with gap-8, mixing large dominant hero cards with smaller stat cards.

dashboard_and_builder.grid_mode: Control Room layout. Dense, gap-4 to gap-6. Use h-full to stretch children.

artisan_template.grid_mode: Asymmetric storytelling. Overlapping images, generous breathing room (p-12 inside containers).

buttons.saas: Crisp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm), high contrast background, bold tracking, hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform.
buttons.template: Rounded (rounded-md), deep colors, soft hover shadow, elegant padding (px-8 py-3).

cards.saas: 1px solid border (border-black/10), bg-white, sharp corners, optional crisp shadow.
cards.template: No borders, bg-[#F3F1EC], soft drop-shadow-sm, rounded-lg.

navigation.saas: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with 1px inner border. Absolute positioning z-50.
navigation.template: Solid background (#FDFBF7) with subtle bottom border. High trust, clear contact info.

motion_and_interactions.global: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Use smooth, spring-based transitions for layout changes.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Always explicitly define hover:text and hover:bg for clarity.
motion_and_interactions.ai_generation_page: Use a kinetic/terminal retro-futurism aesthetic during the loading state (ASCII art, tracing beams, typing text) to make the wait feel magical but technical.

media.guidelines: Main agent MUST strictly use these URLs. Never use generic placeholders like via.placeholder.com. Always add descriptive alt tags.

saas_background.description: Smooth blue gradient with lines, used for SaaS marketing abstract hero background behind text.

artisan_hero.description: Skilled carpenter working in rustic workshop. Hero image for the generated artisan template.

artisan_service_1.description: Home under renovation. Used for Service 1 card in template.

artisan_service_2.description: Elegant renovated hallway. Used for Service 2 card in template.

testimonial_portrait.description: Construction worker portrait. Used for testimonial avatar in the SaaS marketing page.

dummy_logo.description: Minimalist 'Branding' graphic used as a placeholder logo for demo artisan sites.

iconography.style: Clean, thin stroke (1.5px or 2px), strictly matching the technical aesthetic of the SaaS and the elegant aesthetic of the template.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load both typography sets from Google Fonts in the main HTML/CSS.
Ensure the SAAS layout uses HTML/Tailwind for marketing, and heavily customized Shadcn for the Dashboard/Builder.
The generated Artisan template MUST be standard HTML/Tailwind without Shadcn components, prioritizing semantic markup and organic styling.
Apply data-testid to all interactive components as per the design rules.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for large sections without tinting or texture, except where explicitly defined in the palette.
When displaying the Artisan site preview inside the SaaS builder, embed it within an 'iframe' or a mocked scaling container to keep CSS scopes clean, or prefix the template classes thoroughly.
